name: paymaster-signer
description: Backend service for signing Paymaster data for ERC-4337 gasless transactions

scripts.test:load:staging:official: LOAD_BASE_URL=https://89rornylmd.execute-api.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/prod LOAD_WARMUP_SECONDS=10 LOAD_CONCURRENCY=4 LOAD_DURATION_SECONDS=30 LOAD_MAX_ERROR_RATE=0.05 LOAD_MAX_P95_MS=800 LOAD_MAX_P99_MS=1500 node load/runLoadTest.mjs
scripts.test:load:staging:official:report: mkdir -p reports/load && LOAD_BASE_URL=https://89rornylmd.execute-api.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/prod LOAD_WARMUP_SECONDS=10 LOAD_CONCURRENCY=4 LOAD_DURATION_SECONDS=30 LOAD_MAX_ERROR_RATE=0.05 LOAD_MAX_P95_MS=800 LOAD_MAX_P99_MS=1500 LOAD_REPORT_FILE=reports/load/staging-official.latest.json node load/runLoadTest.mjs
